data.title: The Godfather
data.plot: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.
data.recommendation: Ar trebui sa vizionati acest film chiar acum!

data.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
data.plot: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe.
data.recommendation: Ar trebui sa vizionati acest film chiar acum!

data.title: Dune
data.plot: A Duke's son leads desert warriors against the galactic emperor and his father's evil nemesis to free their desert world from the emperor's rule.
data.recommendation: Ar trebui sa evitati filmul cu orice pret.

data.title: Avatar
data.plot: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home.
data.recommendation: Ar trebui sa vizionati acest film chiar acum!

data.title: Avatar 2: The Way of Water. Poetic Version
data.recommendation: Nu exista suficiente date de rating pentru o recomandare ferma.

data.title: Angry Birds
data.plot: Friendship is the most expensive and beautiful gift one can give someone. As time passes by, lots of people will walk past, but only some stay with you forever, and those friendships will stick by one's side through thick and thin...
data.recommendation: Nu exista suficiente date de rating pentru o recomandare ferma.

data.title: The Count of Monte Cristo
data.plot: A young man, falsely imprisoned by his jealous "friend", escapes and uses a hidden treasure to exact his revenge.
data.recommendation: Filmul merita luat in calcul, dar nu este o recomandare urgenta.

data.title: Fast and Furious
data.plot: Rare book dealers Joel and Garda take a summertime jaunt to the seashore where he becomes involved in a beauty pageant as investor and judge - much to her chagrin.
data.recommendation: Filmul merita luat in calcul, dar nu este o recomandare urgenta.

data.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
data.plot: A teenager becomes a major competitor in the world of drift racing after moving in with his father in Tokyo to avoid a jail sentence in America.
data.recommendation: Ar trebui sa evitati filmul cu orice pret.

data.title: RoboCop
data.plot: In a violent future in Old Detroit, murdered police officer Alex Murphy is resurrected as RoboCop, a powerful cyborg law enforcer. As he fights crime, he begins to recover memories of his past and seeks revenge on the gang who kil...
data.recommendation: Ar trebui sa vizionati acest film chiar acum!
